text:
It was a stormy night, dark clouds billowed above the village. At the heart of this gloomy landscape dwelt a woman named Amelia. Years ago, Amelia had fallen deeply in love with a prince who was lost in a magical forest. To follow him, she ventured into treacherous territory, bravely confronting monsters and searching tirelessly.

Years passed, and the prince never returned. Amelia grew old alone. One night, a soft glow emanated from an ancient oak tree near her cottage. As she approached, she found a peculiar-looking key stuck in the tree. Interpreting it as a token from her beloved, she reached out to retrieve it.

Opening the old oak's crusty bark, Amelia found it unlocked a treasure chest that whispered secrets of her prince. Inside was a necklace, shimmering with starlight, radiating a gentle warmth.

Every night by moonlight, Amelia would wear the necklace, and the light would draw her dreams closer. She dreamt of bustling
